conservative.name: Mindfire
conservative.requirements:
6 Power
Target within medium range. The target must be suffering from either a permanent or temporary insanity

success.description: You set the target's mind afire with the cackling laughter and tempting whispers of the Great Deceiver. The target suffers a number of wounds equal to the highest severity amongst insanities he is suffering from
As above, but the target suffers wounds equal to the severity sum of all insanities he is suffering from instead

boon.description: Add a tracking token to each temporary insanity the target suffers from

sigmarsComet.description: Deal critical wounds from the wound deck equal to the number of insanities the target is suffering from. Apply the critical wound(s) with the highest severity and discard the rest

reckless.name: Mindfire
reckless.requirements:
6 Power
Target within medium range. The target must be suffering from either a permanent or temporary insanity

success.description: You set the target's mind afire with the cackling laughter and tempting whispers of the Great Deceiver. The target suffers a number of wounds equal to the highest severity amongst insanities he is suffering from
As above, but the target suffers fatigue equal to the severity sum of all insanities he is suffering from instead

sigmarsComet.description: Deal critical wounds from the wound deck equal to the number of insanities the target is suffering from. Apply the critical wound(s) with the highest severity and discard the rest
